name: Delray Beach GreenMarket
description: The best Saturday morning tradition in Delray. Local produce, honey, baked goods, fresh juices, and live music. Bring the dog and a reusable bag.

name: Sunday Yoga in the Park
description: Free community yoga on the lawn at Veterans Park. All levels welcome, just bring a mat. Starts at 9am and goes for about an hour.

name: Delray Beach Run Club
description: Weekly 5K run starting from Veterans Park. All paces welcome, the group usually grabs coffee after. Show up at 6:15am, run starts at 6:30.

name: Delray Beach Run Club (Thursday)
description: Same crew, different day. Thursday run along A1A. Meet at Veterans Park, 3 to 5 miles depending on how you're feeling.

name: Beach Volleyball Pickup Games
description: The courts at the municipal beach fill up every Saturday morning. Just show up and get on a team. Competitive but friendly.

name: Sunday Volleyball at the Beach
description: More pickup volleyball on Sunday mornings. Slightly more relaxed vibe than Saturday. All skill levels.

name: Pineapple Grove Art Walk
description: Monthly art walk through the galleries and studios in Pineapple Grove. Live music, open studios, and the restaurants all do specials.

name: Sunrise Paddleboard Tour
description: Guided SUP tour on the Intracoastal at sunrise. See manatees, dolphins, and the most beautiful light you've ever paddled through.

name: Sunset Paddleboard Tour
description: Same great tour but at golden hour. The Intracoastal glows and the wildlife is active. Book ahead, these fill up.

name: Morning Flow Class
description: Start your day right with a 75-minute vinyasa flow. The 7am class is the most popular but they run classes all morning.

name: Guided Bird Walk
description: Volunteer-led birding tour of the wetlands. They bring binoculars and know every species. Perfect for beginners or serious birders.

name: Boot Camp on the Lawn
description: Free outdoor boot camp on the Old School Square lawn. High energy, all fitness levels, and the trainers push you just enough.

name: Food Truck Saturday
description: Different food truck every Saturday on the Saltwater patio. Grab a beer, grab some food, let the dog run around. Peak weekend vibes.

name: Taiko Drumming Workshop
description: Monthly taiko drumming class in the gardens. No experience needed. It's loud, it's fun, and you will be sore the next day.

name: Dunes Nature Walk
description: Self-guided nature walk through the coastal dunes. Early morning is best for spotting sea turtles during nesting season.

name: Beginner Surf Lessons
description: Group surf lessons for beginners right at the municipal beach. Boards and rash guards included. You will stand up on your first day or your money back.

name: Shark Feeding
description: Watch the staff feed the resident sharks in the reef tank. Kids lose their minds. Quick but cool.

name: Co-Working Studio Sessions | February
description: BYOM[aterials] and start making art | $15.00 per/session

name: West African Dance Experience

name: REAL MEN BAKE
description: Grab your aprons and join REAL MEN BAKE for a fun evening of friendly competition presented by the GFWC Woman's Club of Delray Beach.
externalAddress: 100 West Atlantic Avenue, Delray Beach, FL

name: The Connective Tissue Coalition Presents: Private Screening  of Complicated
description: See the Oscar qualified documentary film on a big mission to move medicine!
externalAddress: 7421 West Atlantic Avenue, Delray Beach, FL

name: Members Fight Night 14
description: Experience the thrill of Members vs Members Fight Night. Live fights, big energy, and nonstop action at Delray Beach Boxing Club.
externalAddress: 2455 North Old Dixie Highway, Delray Beach, FL

name: The SERC Series Presents: Conscious Conversations
description: The SERC Series has been called a TED Talk meets a cocktail party.  It is a monthly event where the community gathers for deep discussions.
externalVenue: The Hub at Space of Mind

name: Jewelry Wax to Silver - Jewelry Carving
description: Craft your own unique genuine silver ring—no prior experience required! All necessary tools and materials provided.

description: A 2-day painting course to create a portrait using acrylic paint. All materials provided!

name: Workshop | Translating Imagery into Meaningful Abstraction NEW

name: The Hot Room x Beach Club: Bottomless Pilates Social
description: Get ready to sweat, sip, and socialize with bottomless Pilates vibes at The Hot Room x Beach Club!
externalAddress: 307 East Atlantic Avenue, Delray Beach, FL

name: Workshop | Make Waves: Abstract the Sea in Acrylic Paint
description: Learn how to break apart waves,  light, and horizon lines into bold shapes and marks. All materials provided!

name: Runway for a Cure
description: Join us for a fabulous fashion show event called "Runway for a Cure" to support diabetes research and awareness!

name: Tuesday Karaoke Night
description: Karaoke Night Out every Tuesday at Tin Roof. Grab a drink, take the mic, and own the Atlantic Ave stage. Free entry with Eventbrite RSVP.

name: Disco Wednesdays
description: NYC DJ BCAIZM spinning pure disco at Radcliffe's Speakeasy — hidden behind The Wine & Spirits Kitchen on Atlantic Ave. Free caviar pumps all night, signature cocktails, and a dance floor built for the 70s. 9pm to 2am.
